name: Koan Hao Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Koan Hao Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells self-adhesive labels in Taiwan. It offers release papers, including PE coated Kraft, glassine, clay coated Kraft, and super calandered Kraft paper; film release liners, such as PET, PP, and HDPE release liners; and adhesive tapes, such as surface protective films, adhesive transfer tapes, and film and non-woven tissue double sided adhesive tapes. The company also provides PSA label materials comprising paper, film, tamper evident, and re-sealable labels; and thermal and UV release film tapes, and PE laminated non-woven products, as well as contract coatings. It serves decorative, electronics and optoelectronics, automobiles, logistics, food and beverage, and consumer commodity industries. The company was formerly known as Koan Hao Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Koan Hao Technology Co., Ltd. in 2013. Koan Hao Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Nantou City, Taiwan.
